entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor L. Moench, the crop being developed and evaluated for yield and earliness in Eritrea

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: The trait of maturing early, evaluated in sorghum progenies

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, a key trait for selection in sorghum

entities.name: PEDIGREE BREEDING METHOD
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop sorghum progenies from crosses

entities.name: ERITREA
entities.description: The country where the sorghum research was conducted

entities.name: HALHALE RESEARCH CENTER
entities.description: The specific research facility in Eritrea where genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to evaluate sorghum genotypes over three years

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: The statistical method used to determine significant mean squares for sorghum characters

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic makeup among the evaluated sorghum genotypes

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in physical characteristics among the evaluated sorghum genotypes

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A morphological trait of sorghum that responded positively to selection

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait used to measure earliness in sorghum

entities.name: GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait of sorghum showing high heritability but low genetic advance

entities.name: GENOTYPIC VARIANCE
entities.description: The variance component attributed to genetic differences in sorghum genotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIANCE
entities.description: The variance component attributed to both genetic and environmental factors in sorghum genotypes

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A measure of phenotypic variability used to analyze sorghum genotypes

entities.name: GENOTYPIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A measure of genetic variability used to analyze sorghum genotypes

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation due to genetic factors, estimated for various sorghum traits

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected genetic gain from selection, noted for specific sorghum traits

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECT
entities.description: The type of gene action influencing plant height and days to 50% flowering

entities.name: NON ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The type of gene action influencing grain weight

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon of superior hybrid performance, potentially influencing grain weight response
